title: Siegen By Sealey 2pc Pick-Up Tool Set - Flexible Claw Grabber, Magnetic Pick-Up Tool - S0610
features: 2PC SET- Set of two flexible lightweight multipurpose pick-up tools, both 610mm in length.
MAGENTIC RETRIEVING TOOL – Magnetic head ideal for picking up lose screws, nuts, pins and bolts.
SPRING LOADED CLAW GRABBER – Four claw extending design, makes it easy to grab objects with gripping range easily adjusted by changing pressure on the handle.
FLEXIBLE BODEN CABLE CONSTRUCTION – Flexible long design makes the tools ideal in space limited and hard-to-reach applications.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE FROM A REPUTABLE UK COMPANY – Founded in 1978, Sealey is a large family run business with a vast product range. Trusted by professionals, all Sealey products are thoroughly tested and backed by unrivalled aftersales service.
description: One with spring loaded claw grab and Bowden cable construction, the other with magnetic head to suit different applications.
